prompt:
A compact first aid kit case sitting on a clean tabletop, its lid open to reveal neatly organized contents: adhesive bandages, sterile gauze pads, small antiseptic wipe packets, and a pair of rolled-up nitrile gloves. The items are arranged in shallow compartments or elastic loops inside the kit, making it easy to see that it is packed for emergencies. A simple red cross icon is embossed on the case, without any readable text.

Near-future solarpunk home or workshop aesthetic with warm lighting and a calm, orderly environment. Photorealistic 512×512 rendering with no brand logos or legible labels on any of the medical supplies. The composition should instantly read as a ready-to-use first aid kit item in the inventory.
